## Checklist
- [ ] `pnpm -r typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm -r lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm -r test` passes (incl. core determinism test)
- [ ] Respects the invariants in `docs/wiki/` (deterministic core, server authority, fair RNG, no pay-to-win)
- [ ] No out-of-scope edits — only files the story/issue names (VULYK Law 3)
- [ ] Architectural change? Added/updated an ADR in `docs/adr/`
- [ ] Updated docs / `memory/` if behavior or invariants changed
- [ ] Commits are conventional and signed off (`git commit -s`)
